name: Sovos Tax Compliance API
what_it_does: Sovos REST API for global tax compliance and regulatory reporting. Enables AI agents to calculate and report sales tax, VAT, and global indirect taxes; generate and file 1099/W-2/ACA tax forms; process e-invoicing for countries with government mandate (Brazil NFe, Italy SDI, Mexico CFDI); and integrate compliance workflows into ERP and financial systems.
use_cases: Calculating and remitting sales tax and VAT from tax compliance automation agents
Filing 1099 and W-2 tax forms from payroll and AP processing agents
Processing government-mandated e-invoices from finance operations agents
Monitoring regulatory changes and compliance status from governance agents
not_for: Simple US-only sales tax without multi-jurisdiction needs
Tax advisory without compliance automation requirements
best_when: An enterprise or mid-market company operating across multiple tax jurisdictions wants AI agents to automate tax calculation, reporting, and e-invoicing compliance at scale.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Tax errors can result in penalties, fines, and regulatory action. Tax calculations depend on accurate business data — garbage in, garbage out. Always reconcile with human review.

auth.notes: Sovos uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials with product-scoped tokens. Separate credentials for different Sovos products (Tax Determination, 1099, e-invoicing). Tokens are short-lived.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier — enterprise pricing with sandbox available
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts based on transaction volume and modules; pricing negotiated
pricing.notes: Enterprise-only pricing. Sovos acquired multiple tax compliance companies — pricing varies by product.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; enterprise SLAs with high-volume support

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Tax filing errors result in penalties — validate all data before submission
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API with OAuth2
Sovos acquired many companies — product portfolio is fragmented with different APIs per product
Government e-invoicing mandates (Brazil, Mexico, Italy) have strict format requirements
Sandbox environments available but may not reflect all regulatory changes
Global VAT/GST rules change frequently — keep Sovos tax content subscriptions current
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Tax compliance data including financial records. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. Enterprise-grade security with high uptime SLA.

security_score_components.security_notes: Tax compliance financial data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 scopes. Multi-region data residency.
